tool_input.old_string:
type SearchArgs struct {
		Query string   `json:"query" jsonschema:"required"`
		Scope string   `json:"scope,omitempty" jsonschema:"enum=global,enum=project,enum=all"`
		Kind  string   `json:"kind,omitempty" jsonschema:"enum=reference,enum=decision,enum=trace"`
		Tags  []string `json:"tags,omitempty"`
		Limit int      `json:"limit,omitempty"`
	}
tool_input.new_string:
type SearchArgs struct {
		Query string   `json:"query" jsonschema:"Natural language search query"`
		Scope string   `json:"scope,omitempty" jsonschema:"Scope filter: global, project, or all"`
		Kind  string   `json:"kind,omitempty" jsonschema:"Kind filter: reference, decision, or trace"`
		Tags  []string `json:"tags,omitempty" jsonschema:"Filter results by tags"`
		Limit int      `json:"limit,omitempty" jsonschema:"Maximum number of results (1-20, default 5)"`
	}
